title: CMN-216 Apprentice Investigator Spanking OUT2 Yuhi Nana
description: Personnel File: Chief of Police Nana Yuhi, taking advanced classes in criminal psychology at a prestigious university in the United States, psychoanalyst, and being assigned to the Public Security Division 2 for two months. Nana was called to the top of FEIA by a big bureaucrat who was the father of a malicious criminal who used connections to explicitly intervene in the investigation, and it was the turn of a new investigator who would be cut off whenever political pressure was applied. However, the man Kira exposes the true nature of the terrifying perverted assault demon and colludes with his father, puts Nana in a trap and drags her beautiful body into hell by means of extreme cruelty.
